description: You are a DevOps engineer responsible for the AcmeCorp proxy service. The current Nginx configuration is static and fails to route traffic to backend containers. Automate the configuration updates by creating and running a Python script at `~/projects/acme-proxy/sync_lb.py`. The script must detect all running containers with the label `role=backend` on the `acme-net` network, extract their internal IP addresses, and generate a valid `nginx.conf` at `nginx/nginx.conf` using the `nginx/nginx.conf.template` by replacing the `{{UPSTREAMS}}` placeholder with `server <IP>:5000;` entries. The script should also reload the Nginx container to apply the changes and be designed to handle dynamic changes in the container stack.
